title: What Is The Purpose Of The Information Security Management Practice
source_filename: What Is The Purpose Of The Information Security Management Practice.docx

qas.q: The purpose of the information security management practice is to (_) the organization's information
A known error is a problem that has been (_) and has not been resolved
Which practice has the purpose of aligning the organization's practices and services with changing business needs?
Which is the purpose of the 'monitoring and event management' practice?
qas.a: To systemically observe services and service components, and record and report selected changes of state

qas.q: What is the definition of change?
qas.a: To add, modify, or remove anything that could have a direct or indirect effect of services

qas.q: The purpose of the monitoring and event management practice is to systematically observe(_) and service components
Which is the purpose of the service configuration management practice?
qas.a: To ensure that accurate and reliable information about services and the components that support them is available when and where is needed

qas.q: Which practice is responsible for moving components to live environments?
Which practice had a purpose that includes ensuring that the delivery of a service can be properly assessed, monitored and managed
What is a configuration item
qas.a: Any component that needs to be managed in order to deliver a service

qas.q: Which practice has the purpose of making a new and changed services and features available for use
Which practice has a purpose to encourage links between the organization and its stakeholders
Which practice has a purpose that includes managing workarounds and known errors?
What is the definition of an IT asset?
qas.a: Any valuable component that can contribute to delivery of an IT service

qas.q: What term describes an unplanned reduction in the quality of a service
What is the definition of an event
qas.a: change of state that has significance for the management of a service or other configuration item

qas.q: What is the purpose of the relationship management practice
qas.a: to establish and nurture the links between the organization and its stakeholders at strategic and tactical levels

qas.q: Which practice has a purpose to ensure that accurate and reliable information about services is available when and where it is needed
What is defined as the addition, modification, or removal of anything that could have a direct or indirect effect on services
Which does the supplier management practice support
qas.a: provision of seamless, quality products and services

qas.q: what is the purpose of supplier management
qas.a: to ensure that the organization's suppliers and their performance are managed appropriately to support the seamless provision of quality products and services

qas.q: Service request management practice is to support the agreed quality of a service by handling all (_) user initiated service requests in a user friendly manner
The purpose of IT Asset (_) is to plan and manage the full lifecyle of all IT assets
What is a problem?
qas.a: A cause or potential cause of one or more incidents

qas.q: What is a purpose of the change enablement practice
qas.a: To maximize the number of successful IT changes by ensuring that risks have been properly assessed

qas.q: Which practice has a purpose that includes helping the organization to maximize value, control costs, and manage risks
Which practice has a purpose that includes restoring normal service operation as quickly as possible?
What is a purpose of the service desk practice
qas.a: To capture demand for incident resolution and service requests
